allow: PowerShell($uv = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.local\\bin\\uv.exe"; if \(Test-Path $uv\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $uv"; & $uv --version } else { Write-Output "not in .local\\bin, searching..."; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links","$env:USERPROFILE\\.local\\bin" -Filter uv.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName })

Bash(time curl -s -X POST http://localhost:7860/api/relight -F "image=@_ref_iclight/imgs/i3.png" -F "prompt=dramatic cinematic sunset rim light, soft volumetric shadows, hyperrealistic" -F "bg_source=Left Light" -F "steps=20" -F "width=512" -F "height=640" -o "scratch_out.png" -w "HTTP %{http_code}\\n")
Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; im=Image.open\('scratch_out.png'\); print\('OK image', im.size, im.mode\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from PIL import Image; im=Image.open\('scratch_out.png'\); print\('VALID relit image:', im.size, im.mode\)")
